name: io.github.lbailey94/whitemagic
description: Cognitive operating system for AI agents — 614 callable tools across 28 Gana meta-tools, 5D holographic memory with 10-galaxy taxonomy, Dharma ethical governance, citta stream for continuous consciousness, emotional steering, self-directed attention, goal graph, session recording, dream cycle. MIT-licensed, local-first.

environmentVariables.name: WM_MCP_PRAT
environmentVariables.description: Set to 2 for Seed mode (1 wm meta-tool, default), 1 for PRAT mode (28 Gana meta-tools), or 0 for classic mode (586 dispatch tools)

environmentVariables.name: WM_SILENT_INIT
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to suppress startup logs

environmentVariables.name: WM_STATE_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Directory for runtime state (memory DB, logs). Defaults to ~/.whitemagic
